quotes.text: The best way to get rich is to solve a problem so well that people tell their friends about it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to grow an indie business is to make your existing customers happier. New customers come from happy ones.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If your users aren't inviting others, your product isn't good enough. Viral growth starts with genuine satisfaction.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Revenue is a lagging indicator. Customer satisfaction is a leading indicator. Measure both.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best growth comes from solving a problem so well that people tell their friends.
